checks.detail: No evidence in data/ or site/ of orchestrator-authored edits; all files conform to the schema/paths owned by their designated agent.

raw -> summary math for W28 reconciles exactly (vert 1951m, time 34365s, distance 59024m, 7 daily rows all verified by hand); summary -> site sync verified byte-identical; no evidence builder read Strava or analyst wrote HTML.
Every #hex literal in site/styles.css and site/app.js belongs to the 15 TMS9918 values; the only other #NNNN-looking strings in index.html are HTML numeric entities (▲ ⏱), not colors.
grep for href="/ and src="/ across site/ returned zero matches; index.html, nav links, and script tags all use relative paths (styles.css, data.js, app.min.js).

index.html loads app.min.js (not app.js); app.min.js contains the recent VERT/TIME-toggle strings (metric-time/metric-vert) present in app.js, confirming it was regenerated after that feature landed, not stale.
site/data.js is generated with correct header comment, contains plan.json + all 5 summaries including full W28 data and the updated index list; index.html loads data.js before app.min.js.

window = 2026-07-06T00:00:00 to 2026-07-12T23:59:59 Europe/London (Mon-Sun) in both raw and summary; independently recomputed ISO week 28 start date (2026-07-06) matches; days_elapsed=7 is consistent with generation on the final day of the window.
data/plan.json week 5 entry (iso_week 2026-W28, phase Base, vert_target_m 1800, tof_target_h [6,7]) matches summary's target_m 1800 and phase Base exactly; plan.json untouched by this run's agents.

No credentials found. Only secret-pattern grep hit was data/review/2026-W28.json, a stale prior review artifact whose text merely describes grep patterns (access_token etc.), not an actual key. That stale file is replaced by this review as part of the current run.

Not independently verifiable without Bash/git access (out of this agent's toolset); no commit had been made yet for this run at review time, so this invariant is not yet applicable at the review stage.

8 raw activities include 1 WeightTraining (correctly excluded) and 7 on-foot (3x TrailRun, 3x Walk, 1x Hike) all within the Run/TrailRun/VirtualRun/Walk/Hike set; sessions.count=8, on_foot_count=7 matches.
data/raw/2026-W28.json and data/summary/2026-W28.json field sets match CLAUDE.md's documented shapes exactly.
data/summary/index.json and site/data/summary/index.json both list W24-W28, sorted ascending, no duplicates.
No calf-related text found in any of the 8 raw activity descriptions for W28; flags: [] correctly reflects that.
